title: Zrenjanin, Vojvodina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Zrenjanin, Vojvodina: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Zrenjanin is a city in Vojvodina with a population of 76,000. A city in the Banat region of Vojvodina, known for its industrial heritage, the Begej River, and its well-preserved 19th-century architecture.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
